description: Yelp provides local business listings, reviews, and related consumer/business data. Its developer platform offers APIs for place search, business data, transactions, advertising, insights, and AI-powered local search experiences.
summary: Yelp exposes a documented HTTP API at `https://api.yelp.com/v3`, a GraphQL API at `https://api.yelp.com/v3/graphql`, and a public MCP endpoint at `https://mcp-openai.yelp.com/mcp/`; the HTTP and GraphQL APIs use a Yelp-issued API key via Bearer auth.
